summary: DHH celebrates successfully converting several friends and study buddies to Apple products through persistent personal evangelism. After months of advocating for Apple, two study buddies bought iBooks, one's brother also purchased one, and another is considering it. He uses this as evidence that great products at reasonable prices generate organic, free marketing through word of mouth.
key_points: Personal evangelism for products you love can be highly effective at driving purchases
Great products at fair prices create their own marketing through passionate users
Word-of-mouth converts can create a chain reaction, spreading beyond the initial audience
money_quotes: When you create fantastic products and price them reasonably marketing can at times be had for free.
key_insight: Exceptional products at fair prices turn customers into unpaid evangelists, making traditional marketing unnecessary.
